name: Patel Impex Blog Manager
description: Manage blog posts on the Patel Impex website — create, edit, delete, publish, schedule, and optimize content with full SEO support.

tools.create_blog: Create a new blog post with full SEO, categories, tags, and scheduling
tools.update_blog: Update any field of an existing blog post
tools.list_blogs: List blog posts with filters and pagination
tools.get_blog: Get a single blog post by ID or URL slug
tools.publish_blog: Publish a draft or scheduled blog post immediately
tools.schedule_blog: Schedule a blog post for future publication
tools.upload_featured_image: Upload a featured image and get a public URL
tools.generate_seo: Analyze content and generate SEO recommendations
tools.bulk_create_blogs: Create multiple blog posts in a single operation
